title: bidens tripartita subsp. hirta
intro: Bidens tripartita subsp. hirta, also known as hairy beggar-ticks, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bidens tripartita subsp. hirta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
